quotes.text: Talk is cheap. Show me the code.
quotes.author: Linus Torvalds

quotes.text: Any fool can write code that a computer can understand. Good programmers write code that humans can understand.
quotes.author: Martin Fowler

quotes.text: First, solve the problem. Then, write the code.
quotes.author: John Johnson

quotes.text: The best way to predict the future is to invent it.
quotes.author: Alan Kay

quotes.text: Simplicity is the soul of efficiency.
quotes.author: Austin Freeman

quotes.text: Make it work, make it right, make it fast.
quotes.author: Kent Beck

quotes.text: Code is like humor. When you have to explain it, it is bad.
quotes.author: Cory House

quotes.text: Before software can be reusable it first has to be usable.
quotes.author: Ralph Johnson

quotes.text: The most damaging phrase in the language is: it has always been done this way.
quotes.author: Grace Hopper

quotes.text: If debugging is the process of removing software bugs, then programming must be the process of putting them in.
quotes.author: Edsger Dijkstra

quotes.text: Programs must be written for people to read, and only incidentally for machines to execute.
quotes.author: Harold Abelson

quotes.text: The function of good software is to make the complex appear to be simple.
quotes.author: Grady Booch

quotes.text: There are only two hard things in computer science: cache invalidation and naming things.
quotes.author: Phil Karlton

quotes.text: Walking on water and developing software from a specification are easy if both are frozen.
quotes.author: Edward Berard

quotes.text: The best programs are written so that computing machines can perform them quickly and so that human beings can understand them clearly.
quotes.author: Donald Knuth

quotes.text: In order to be irreplaceable, one must always be different.
quotes.author: Coco Chanel

quotes.text: Life is what happens to you while you are busy making other plans.
quotes.author: John Lennon

quotes.text: The way to get started is to quit talking and begin doing.
quotes.author: Walt Disney

quotes.text: It does not matter how slowly you go as long as you do not stop.
quotes.author: Confucius

quotes.text: Everything you have ever wanted is on the other side of fear.
quotes.author: George Addair

quotes.text: Success is not final, failure is not fatal: it is the courage to continue that counts.
quotes.author: Winston Churchill

quotes.text: The only way to do great work is to love what you do.
quotes.author: Steve Jobs

quotes.text: I have not failed. I have just found ten thousand ways that do not work.
quotes.author: Thomas Edison

quotes.text: You miss one hundred percent of the shots you do not take.
quotes.author: Wayne Gretzky

quotes.text: Whether you think you can or you think you cannot, you are right.
quotes.author: Henry Ford

quotes.text: The secret of getting ahead is getting started.
quotes.author: Mark Twain

quotes.text: It always seems impossible until it is done.
quotes.author: Nelson Mandela

quotes.text: Do not watch the clock. Do what it does. Keep going.
quotes.author: Sam Levenson

quotes.text: Keep your face always toward the sunshine and shadows will fall behind you.
quotes.author: Walt Whitman

quotes.text: An unexamined life is not worth living.
quotes.author: Socrates

quotes.text: The only true wisdom is in knowing you know nothing.
quotes.author: Socrates

quotes.text: To be or not to be, that is the question.
quotes.author: William Shakespeare

quotes.text: All that we see or seem is but a dream within a dream.
quotes.author: Edgar Allan Poe

quotes.text: It is never too late to be what you might have been.
quotes.author: George Eliot

quotes.text: We are what we repeatedly do. Excellence, then, is not an act, but a habit.
quotes.author: Aristotle

quotes.text: No act of kindness, no matter how small, is ever wasted.
quotes.author: Aesop

quotes.text: The journey of a thousand miles begins with one step.
quotes.author: Lao Tzu

quotes.text: A room without books is like a body without a soul.
quotes.author: Marcus Tullius Cicero

quotes.text: You only live once, but if you do it right, once is enough.
quotes.author: Mae West

quotes.text: Be yourself; everyone else is already taken.
quotes.author: Oscar Wilde

quotes.text: Two things are infinite: the universe and human stupidity; and I am not sure about the universe.
quotes.author: Albert Einstein

quotes.text: Be the change that you wish to see in the world.
quotes.author: Mahatma Gandhi

quotes.text: In the end, it is not the years in your life that count. It is the life in your years.
quotes.author: Abraham Lincoln

quotes.text: If you tell the truth, you do not have to remember anything.
quotes.author: Mark Twain

quotes.text: A friend is someone who knows all about you and still loves you.
quotes.author: Elbert Hubbard

quotes.text: To live is the rarest thing in the world. Most people exist, that is all.
quotes.author: Oscar Wilde

quotes.text: Without music, life would be a mistake.
quotes.author: Friedrich Nietzsche

quotes.text: I am not young enough to know everything.
quotes.author: Oscar Wilde

quotes.text: The truth is rarely pure and never simple.
quotes.author: Oscar Wilde

quotes.text: Imagination is more important than knowledge.
quotes.author: Albert Einstein

quotes.text: Logic will get you from A to B. Imagination will take you everywhere.
quotes.author: Albert Einstein

quotes.text: The difference between stupidity and genius is that genius has its limits.
quotes.author: Albert Einstein

quotes.text: A clever person solves a problem. A wise person avoids it.
quotes.author: Albert Einstein

quotes.text: If you want your children to be intelligent, read them fairy tales.
quotes.author: Albert Einstein

quotes.text: Anyone who stops learning is old, whether at twenty or eighty.
quotes.author: Henry Ford

quotes.text: Quality is not an act, it is a habit.
quotes.author: Aristotle

quotes.text: Education is the most powerful weapon which you can use to change the world.
quotes.author: Nelson Mandela

quotes.text: It is during our darkest moments that we must focus to see the light.
quotes.author: Aristotle

quotes.text: Spread love everywhere you go. Let no one ever come to you without leaving happier.
quotes.author: Mother Teresa

quotes.text: When you reach the end of your rope, tie a knot in it and hang on.
quotes.author: Franklin D. Roosevelt

quotes.text: Always remember that you are absolutely unique. Just like everyone else.
quotes.author: Margaret Mead

quotes.text: Do not go where the path may lead, go instead where there is no path and leave a trail.
quotes.author: Ralph Waldo Emerson

quotes.text: You will face many defeats in life, but never let yourself be defeated.
quotes.author: Maya Angelou

quotes.text: The greatest glory in living lies not in never falling, but in rising every time we fall.
quotes.author: Nelson Mandela

quotes.text: In the end, it is not the years in your life that count. It is the life in your years.
quotes.author: Abraham Lincoln

quotes.text: Never let the fear of striking out keep you from playing the game.
quotes.author: Babe Ruth

quotes.text: Life is either a daring adventure or nothing at all.
quotes.author: Helen Keller

quotes.text: Many of life's failures are people who did not realize how close they were to success when they gave up.
quotes.author: Thomas Edison

quotes.text: You have brains in your head. You have feet in your shoes. You can steer yourself any direction you choose.
quotes.author: Dr. Seuss

quotes.text: If life were predictable it would cease to be life, and be without flavor.
quotes.author: Eleanor Roosevelt

quotes.text: If you look at what you have in life, you will always have more.
quotes.author: Oprah Winfrey

quotes.text: If you set your goals ridiculously high and it is a failure, you will fail above everyone else's success.
quotes.author: James Cameron

quotes.text: You do not find the happy life. You make it.
quotes.author: Camilla Eyring Kimball

quotes.text: First forget inspiration. Habit is more dependable. Habit will sustain you whether you are inspired or not.
quotes.author: Octavia Butler

quotes.text: We do not remember days, we remember moments.
quotes.author: Cesare Pavese

quotes.text: The purpose of our lives is to be happy.
quotes.author: Dalai Lama

quotes.text: Get busy living or get busy dying.
quotes.author: Stephen King

quotes.text: You only live once, but if you do it right, once is enough.
quotes.author: Mae West

quotes.text: The most important thing is to enjoy your life - to be happy - it is all that matters.
quotes.author: Steve Jobs

quotes.text: Do what you feel in your heart to be right, for you will be criticized anyway.
quotes.author: Eleanor Roosevelt

quotes.text: Happiness is not something ready made. It comes from your own actions.
quotes.author: Dalai Lama

quotes.text: If you are not willing to risk the usual, you will have to settle for the ordinary.
quotes.author: Jim Rohn

quotes.text: The bad news is time flies. The good news is you are the pilot.
quotes.author: Michael Altshuler

quotes.text: Life has no remote control. Get up and change it yourself.
quotes.author: Mark A. Cooper

quotes.text: Hardships often prepare ordinary people for an extraordinary destiny.
quotes.author: C. S. Lewis

quotes.text: The only impossible journey is the one you never begin.
quotes.author: Tony Robbins

quotes.text: In this life we cannot do great things. We can only do small things with great love.
quotes.author: Mother Teresa

quotes.text: Not how long, but how well you have lived is the main thing.
quotes.author: Seneca

quotes.text: If you want to live a happy life, tie it to a goal, not to people or things.
quotes.author: Albert Einstein

quotes.text: Never let the fear of striking out keep you from playing the game.
quotes.author: Babe Ruth

quotes.text: Money and success do not change people; they merely amplify what is already there.
quotes.author: Will Smith

quotes.text: Your time is limited, so do not waste it living someone else's life.
quotes.author: Steve Jobs

quotes.text: Not all those who wander are lost.
quotes.author: J. R. R. Tolkien

quotes.text: There is no greater agony than bearing an untold story inside you.
quotes.author: Maya Angelou

quotes.text: Outside of a dog, a book is man's best friend. Inside of a dog it is too dark to read.
quotes.author: Groucho Marx

quotes.text: The world is a book and those who do not travel read only one page.
quotes.author: Saint Augustine

quotes.text: A reader lives a thousand lives before he dies. The man who never reads lives only one.
quotes.author: George R. R. Martin

quotes.text: One must always be careful of books and what is inside them, for words have the power to change us.
quotes.author: Cassandra Clare

quotes.text: There is no friend as loyal as a book.
quotes.author: Ernest Hemingway

quotes.text: So many books, so little time.
quotes.author: Frank Zappa

quotes.text: If you only read the books that everyone else is reading, you can only think what everyone else is thinking.
quotes.author: Haruki Murakami

quotes.text: It is a truth universally acknowledged, that a single man in possession of a good fortune, must be in want of a wife.
quotes.author: Jane Austen
